calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Blaine I. Green, Esq. and Dustin Chase-Woods, Esq. of PILLSBURY WINTHROP SHAW PITTMAN LLP, T:415.983.1000, for petitioner/moving party;
Harry W.R. Chamberlain, II, Esq. of BUCHALTER, T:213.891.5115, for respondent Winery Exchange;
Michael J. McCue, Esq. of LEWIS ROCA ROTHGERBER CHRISTIE, T:702.949.8224, for respondent.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court takes PETITIONERS JRV, LLC & BILL LEIGON's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONERS JRV, LLC, BILL LEIGON's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is continued to January 7, 2020 per agreement of parties.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
